ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the course (e.g., 11657) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Full name of the course (e.g., L Arch 1 WFU) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits offered for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses required for enrollment */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the course is currently active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "syllabus_url" TEXT /* URL to the course syllabus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the instructor is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the instructor is the primary instructor for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classrooms" (
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classroom */,
  "classroom_name" TEXT /* Name of the classroom */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the classroom */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the classroom can accommodate */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the classroom is currently active */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* List of equipment available in the classroom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classroom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classroom */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date of the schedule */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the schedule is recurring */,
  "recurring_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of recurrence (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the recurring schedule ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_classroom_id FOREIGN KEY ("classroom_id") REFERENCES classrooms ("classroom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped, completed) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  "is_waitlisted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the student is on the waitlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Student's major */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of study (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the student is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_departments" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the department is the primary department for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restrictions" (
  "restriction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restriction */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "restriction_type" TEXT /* Type of restriction (e.g., priority, limited slots) */,
  "restriction_value" TEXT /* Value of the restriction (e.g., 5 slots for BS Arch) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the restriction starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the restriction ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restriction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restrictions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "waitlist_date" TEXT /* Date the student was added to the waitlist */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the student on the waitlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
